title: The bibliography of Rudolf Nieuwenhuys.
abstract: This comprehensive bibliography of Rudolf Nieuwenhuys's publications accompanies the multi-authored eulogy: Rudolf Nieuwenhuys (11 June 1927-4 November 2024): a scholarly life (Bakker et al. 2025, https://doi.org/10.1007/s00429-025-02953-1 ). In that article, the sections "Seventy Years of Comparative Neuroanatomy" by Hans ten Donkelaar and "Towards a New Neuromorphology" by Luis Puelles provide a description of the broad scientific interests of Rudolf. His legacy to the neuroscience community becomes further apparent in this bibliography, a condensed representation of his scientific endeavors.
